---
title: "\'What can be done for our women?\' By C. M. Yonge"
---

## \'What can be done for our women?\' By C. M. Yonge

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1894
**Genre:** Non-fiction
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>Mothers in Council</i> 4:14 (April 1894) 115-123

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
